articles.title: 1 injured in road rage incident involving gun in South Shore library parking lot
articles.description:
A passenger in one of the cars involved fired a gun during a road rage incident, the Hingham Police Department said.

articles.title: DA: Man charged with murder allegedly killed friend by mistake during gunfight in Dorchester
